name: empty-root-cd-guard
title: Guard empty repo-root before cd in shipped scripts
description: Copilot on the 0.5.13 refresh PRs (AMC #193 comment 3522597638, website #85 comment 3522597484) found that cd "$REPO_ROOT" || exit 1 does not fire when REPO_ROOT is empty: bash cd "" is a silent rc-0 no-op (verified empirically), so a failed command-substitution leaves the script running in the wrong directory — and set -e does not help since the cd succeeds. Three shipped scripts share the pattern (review-local.sh, full-check.sh, review-scope.sh). Add an explicit empty check plus cd guard with a named error at all three sites; ship as 0.5.14.
creator: sdelmas
